title: Ganglion cyst - NHS
text:
steroid injection to reduce swelling cutting the cyst out with a small surgical operation Once a cyst is removed it usually does not return, but sometimes it can come back.
Causes of ganglion cysts 
The cause of ganglion cysts is not always known, but they sometimes happen after an injury causes fluid to leak from a joint.
They are much more common in women than in men.

Next review due: 16 July 2028
